title: allosteric_v1 — ALLOSTERIC sub-axis output rows
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/allosteric_sim.py. One row per allosteric-modulator class: the MWC / ternary-complex equilibrium (cooperativity factor alpha, EC50 affinity-shift sweep, the SATURABLE allosteric ceiling 1/alpha) and the PAM/NAM/neutral classification, anchored to the Monod-Wyman-Changeux concerted allosteric model. ALLOSTERIC is a SUB-AXIS :> QUANTUM core (AXIS/HIERARCHY.tape) — NOT a hexa-bio core-5 axis. In-silico simulator-consistency only (AGENTS.tape g8/f2).

modulator.description: Modulator identifier within the deterministic panel.

drug_precedent.description: Own drug precedent for the modality (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived).

cooperativity_alpha.description: Allosteric cooperativity factor alpha (affinity). >1 PAM, <1 NAM, ~1 neutral.

modulator_kd_uM.description: Equilibrium dissociation constant of the modulator at its allosteric site (micromolar).

saturation_sweep.description: EC50 affinity-shift ratio across a free-modulator concentration sweep.

allosteric_ceiling_shift.description: Limiting (saturating) affinity shift as [B] -> infinity = 1/alpha — the allosteric ceiling, the real-limit bound.

ec50_shift_at_max_conc.description: EC50 shift at the highest probed modulator concentration (approaches the ceiling).

ceiling_respected.description: True iff the modelled shift approaches but does not pass the 1/alpha ceiling (real-limit respected).

sweep_monotone_toward_ceiling.description: True iff the affinity-shift sweep is monotone toward the allosteric ceiling.

log10_alpha.description: log10 of the cooperativity factor (used for PAM/NAM/neutral classification).
